subject: feat(engine): implement hybrid forecasting engine and actuals-first data model
body:
Phase 1 (Data Model) and Phase 3 (Forecasting Engine) of the actuals-first pivot.
Replaces the budget-first paradigm with unified Transaction model, recurring pattern
detection, Holt's double exponential smoothing for variable spending, and daily
cash runway projection.

New engines: patterns.ts (frequency detection, deterministic scheduling),
forecast.ts (Holt + day-of-week + confidence bands), accuracy.ts (MAE/RMSE/bias/WMAPE),
runway.ts (daily balance + depletion + band scenarios).

DB schema v6: clean slate migration dropping expenses/actuals/categoryMappings.
142 tests passing, type-check clean.

Tags: forecasting, data-model, engine, patterns, accuracy, runway
Complexity: 5
Urgency: 3
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: actuals-first-pivot
Semver: major
